title: GENERAL DENTAL CARE - 211info
text: NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER OREGON CITY DENTAL CLINIC GENERAL DENTAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dental services for children and adults which includes diagnostic (exams, x-rays), preventative (dental sealants, cleanings, fluoride, education) and restorative (fillings, crowns, some root canals, extractions, partial and full dentures). Emergeny care provided for patients with symptoms of dental pain, an abscess, swelling or bleeding. 19029 S Beavercreek Road Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-noon and 1pm-6pm (503) 941-3064 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 941-3064 Main phone (503) 941-3075 FAX Main phone (503) 941-3064 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or appointment FEES: Accepts OHP (Health Share, FamilyCare, and Open Card), Delta Dental, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fee available. $25 down payment for first visit. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. If applying for sliding scale fees bring one of the following, last 2 pay stubs, previous year's tax return or unemployment statement. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus line 32, S Beavercreek & Maplelane stop. Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Hygiene Dental Prosthodontics Dental Restoration Emergency Dental Care General Dentistry Pediatric Dentistry If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER OREGON CITY DENTAL CLINIC
